# Book 1 Chapter 1 Prose Generation Packet

## Artifact Source
- Generated by `ProseGenerationOutputPathService.buildChapter1Packet()`
- Contract: `book1_chapter1_prose_generation_packet`

## Packet Contents
- Chapter psychology target (mode, objective, pull profile)
- Chapter state summary (dominant pressures, chapter mode)
- Beat chain summary (ordered beat types)
- Derived prose constraints
- Paragraph recommendations (first 2-3 paragraphs)
- Validation expectations
- Opening ending-vector recommendation

## Opening Segment Guidance
- Paragraph 1: labor + sensory salience before explanation
- Paragraph 2: environmental confirmation + social cue routing
- Paragraph 3: memory comparison + unresolved operational adjustment
- End vector: consequence-seeded carry-forward pressure
